name: Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Physical, Lightning, Duration, Brand

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, adding energy to the branded enemy. When the branded enemy reaches 20 energy, a large explosion occurs and the brand is removed. All energy is removed from the enemy when the brand is detached.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Increases and Reductions to Cast Speed also apply to this Skill's Activation frequency
Can be Detached for a total Duration of 6.00 seconds
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 45% more Damage with Ailments
Supported Skills deal 80% less Damage with Hits
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Damage over Time
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies, or can deal burning damage directly.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Burning Damage
Supported Skills deal 35% more Burning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.
explicitMods: Ignites caused by Supported Skills spread to other Enemies within 2 metres
Supported Skills deal 25% more Damage with Ignite
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies or inflicts ailments
explicitMods: 65% increased Duration of Ailments inflicted with Supported Skills
Supported Skills have 55% increased Effect of non-Damaging Ailments on Enemies
Supported Skills deal 20% more Damage with Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that has a duration, or can hit enemies to inflict ailments on them.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 40% more Damage over Time
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Damage over Time
25% less Duration of Supported Skills and Damaging Ailments they inflict
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: This Gem can only Support Skill Gems requiring Level 38 or lower
Trigger Supported Spells when you take 528 total Damage from Hits
Supported Skills require 10% reduced amount of Damage taken to Trigger
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Strikes enemies in front of you with a surge of flame. Burning enemies are dealt more damage. If you hit an ignited enemy, will create burning ground under them. Your damage modifiers don't apply to this burning ground.
explicitMods: 73% more Damage with Hits against Burning enemies
Hits on Ignited Enemies create Burning Ground, no more than once every 2 seconds
Burning Ground deals 25% of Fire Damage per second of Ignite affecting Enemy
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Fire, Travel, Blink

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving a trail of burning ground. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 1738.6 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.name: Foul Sphere
implicitMods: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicitMods: Adds 9 to 12 Cold Damage to Spells
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

name: Storm March
implicitMods: Ignites you inflict deal Damage 7% faster
Drops Scorched Ground while moving, lasting 5 seconds
explicitMods: 12% increased Movement Speed if you haven't been Hit Recently

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that have a cooldown. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 45% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "The science is... incomprehensible at best. Nearest I can tell, the Arcana exhibits
a blast of wrath once it has been fully charged, and when directed at the Elder
will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Gain a buff that makes you faster, harder to detect, and grants Phasing, letting you pass through enemies. Performing any skill replaces this buff with one that boosts melee physical damage of skills you use yourself (it will not apply to your melee skills used by totems). Consumes Frenzy Charges to increase duration.
explicitMods: 100% increased Skill Duration per Frenzy Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

70% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take 2209 Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Jiquani's Potential
implicitMods: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitMods: 1 to 57 Spell Lightning Damage per 10 Intelligence
flavourText: "I have risked everything. My position, my ambition, my
very life. There has to be a way to save our people. If we
must, let us tear apart the very foundations of reality!"

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Once activated, continuously spends mana to cause volleys of ethereal weapons rain from the sky around you, dealing damage to enemies they impact. Each Blade will target a separate enemy in the volley area if possible. Each enemy can only be hit once by each volley, even if multiple blades land near them. This skill cannot be triggered or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
explicitMods: A Volley of blades falls every 0.7 seconds
2% increased Volley frequency per 100 maximum Mana
5 Blades fall per Volley, which will then Linger in the ground
Maximum 40 Lingering Blades can be left in the ground at a time
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

craftedMods: 55% of Damage from your Hits cannot be Reflected during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Honour Touch
implicitMods: Inflict Fire Exposure on Hit, applying -13% to Fire Resistance
+20% to Fire Damage over Time Multiplier

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 24% increased Aura effect

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you

Ignite on Cursed enemies has 20% increased Duration

Heist Chests have a 2% chance to Duplicate contained Basic Currency
1% chance in Heists for Items to drop fully linked
55% Chance to Avoid being Stunned during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Widowhail
explicitMods: 239% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe

properties.name: Exceptional, Warcry, Support, Attack, AoE, Physical, Trigger, Melee

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports warcry skills you use yourself.
explicitMods: Supported Warcries Trigger Seize the Flesh on use
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: In its madness, Xesht desperately seeks communion.

hybrid.secDescrText: Cause spires of bone to erupt from the earth around you. When you use a slam on them, these spires will explode to deal damage in an area and inflicting bleeding.

explicitMods: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 29% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.
